 View

Create New Batch

Automated uses the research agent. Manual lets you define each draft yourself. Character Consistency uses the saved reference character and full Veo 3.1. Manage character

Uses the active character snapshot from Settings. Scenes are varied per post type during prompt generation.

Manual batches create blank draft posts that you will edit by hand.

Choose the batch duration once. The pipeline is selected automatically.

Manual batches resolve video duration automatically from each approved script. Short scripts submit as short clips; longer scripts upgrade to extended routes when the dialogue supports it.

Workspace Accounts

Accounts

Connect provider accounts once, reuse them across batches, and manage login state before you reach publish planning.

Meta

Facebook + Instagram

One login for the Facebook Page and linked Instagram business account you publish from.

Current Login

TikTok

TikTok

Connect the TikTok account you use for direct posts and draft exports.

Current Login

Flow

1. Open the provider card you want to connect.

2. Complete the provider login and permissions flow.

3. Return to Lippe Lift Studio and keep publishing from the same workspace identity.

Lippe Lift Operations Hub

System Health

Create New Batch

Automated uses the research agent. Manual lets you define each draft yourself. Character Consistency uses the saved reference character and full Veo 3.1. Manage character

Uses the active character snapshot from Settings. Scenes are varied per post type during prompt generation.

Manual batches create blank draft posts that you will edit by hand.

Choose the batch duration once. The pipeline is selected automatically.

Manual batches resolve video duration automatically from each approved script. Short scripts submit as short clips; longer scripts upgrade to extended routes when the dialogue supports it.

Workspace Accounts

Accounts

Connect provider accounts once, reuse them across batches, and manage login state before you reach publish planning.

Meta

Facebook + Instagram

One login for the Facebook Page and linked Instagram business account you publish from.

Current Login

TikTok

TikTok

Connect the TikTok account you use for direct posts and draft exports.

Current Login

Flow

1. Open the provider card you want to connect.

2. Complete the provider login and permissions flow.

3. Return to Lippe Lift Studio and keep publishing from the same workspace identity.

Lippe Lift Operations Hub

System Health
